description: Using the food.gdt dataset containing weekly food expenditure and income for 40 households, perform a structural break test. Conduct an OLS regression with 'food_exp' as the dependent variable and 'income' as the independent variable, then perform a Chow test for a structural break at observation 20. Save the complete output, including both the regression and Chow test results, to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/chow_test_results.txt.
